candidate_check.description: Windows Server 2022 must be configured for certificate-based authentication for domain controllers.

check_content_excerpt:
This applies to domain controllers. This is not applicable for member servers.

If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding:
Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Kdc
 
Value Name: StrongCertificateBindingEnforcement
 
Value Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 0x00000001 (1) or 0x00000002 (2)
fix_text_excerpt:
Configure the registry value.
Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Kdc
 
Value Name: StrongCertificateBindingEnforcement
 
Value Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 0x00000001 (1) or 0x00000002 (2)
title: Windows Server 2022 must be configured for certificate-based authentication for domain controllers.
